title: vitis rupestris
intro: Vitis rupestris, also known as the rocky grapevine, is a plant species in the family Vitaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vitis rupestris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat digestive issues due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Vitis rupestris can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and useful medicinal plant.
